base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of assembled_structure_flagpole_tower — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Pre-composed flagpole tower — tall vertical pole with flag at top + staircase of blocks leading up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pre-composed flagpole tower — tall vertical pole with flag at top + staircase of blocks leading up; appears at end of non-castle levels for world-clear grab
